message:
feat(ipc): Cx-first IpcClient stubs for non-unix platforms (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to ticks 77 and 78. Adds cross-platform stubs for
all 7 IpcClient `_with_cx` methods on the `#[cfg(not(unix))]`
implementation.

Rationale: callers on Windows / other non-unix platforms that
use `IpcClient::ping_with_cx(&cx)` etc. should compile and get
a clear `unsupported()` error at runtime, matching the legacy
cross-platform pattern. Without these stubs, a cross-platform
caller compiling against the unix-gated `_with_cx` methods
would fail to compile on non-unix.

Additions (asupersync-runtime-gated, inside the
`#[cfg(not(unix))] impl IpcClient { ... }` block):

  * `send_user_var_with_cx(cx, pane_id, name, value)`
  * `ping_with_cx(cx)`
  * `status_with_cx(cx)`
  * `pane_state_with_cx(cx, pane_id)`
  * `set_pane_priority_with_cx(cx, pane_id, priority, ttl_ms)`
  * `clear_pane_priority_with_cx(cx, pane_id)`
  * `call_rpc_with_cx(cx, args, request_id)`

Each takes `&crate::cx::Cx` and always returns
`Err(Self::unsupported())`, matching the legacy non-unix
behavior. No functional change — the cx argument is unused
(`_cx`) on this platform.

No tests added — the existing unix tests cover the unix impl,
and the non-unix path is type-only. Any compile-time regression
on a non-unix caller would surface at build time.

Verification (local fork bypass, unix platform):
  * ipc:: — 95 passed / 0 failed
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1734,6 +1734,71 @@ impl IpcClient {
     ) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
         Err(Self::unsupported())
     }
+
+    // ft-xbnl0.2.3 Cx-first: non-unix stubs so the Cx-first
+    // API surface is available on all platforms for
+    // cross-platform call sites. Each always returns
+    // `unsupported()` just like the legacy counterparts.
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    pub async fn send_user_var_with_cx(
+        &self,
+        _cx: &crate::cx::Cx,
+        _pane_id: u64,
+        _name: String,
+        _value: String,
+    ) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
+        Err(Self::unsupported())
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    pub async fn ping_with_cx(&self, _cx: &crate::cx::Cx) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
+        Err(Self::unsupported())
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    pub async fn status_with_cx(&self, _cx: &crate::cx::Cx) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
+        Err(Self::unsupported())
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    pub async fn pane_state_with_cx(
+        &self,
+        _cx: &crate::cx::Cx,
+        _pane_id: u64,
+    ) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
+        Err(Self::unsupported())
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    pub async fn set_pane_priority_with_cx(
+        &self,
+        _cx: &crate::cx::Cx,
+        _pane_id: u64,
+        _priority: u32,
+        _ttl_ms: Option<u64>,
+    ) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
+        Err(Self::unsupported())
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    pub async fn clear_pane_priority_with_cx(
+        &self,
+        _cx: &crate::cx::Cx,
+        _pane_id: u64,
+    ) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
+        Err(Self::unsupported())
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    pub async fn call_rpc_with_cx(
+        &self,
+        _cx: &crate::cx::Cx,
+        _args: Vec<String>,
+        _request_id: Option<String>,
+    ) -> Result<IpcResponse, UserVarError> {
+        Err(Self::unsupported())
+    }
 }
 
 #[cfg(all(test, unix))]
